paragraphs: Senior Software Engineer with {{OVERALL_EXPERIENCE_YEARS}} years of experience building and architecting high-load web platforms, serverless cloud systems, and AI-powered products. Co-founded ELI and led its technical architecture and implementation across a fully serverless AWS + GCP/Firebase stack, including LLM orchestration, voice recognition, Stripe payments, and algorithm of adaptive learning.

Proven track record of driving engineering quality at scale: led frontend platform for Ukraine's largest job board (6.5M+ resumes, 100K+ active listings), grew the team from 6 to 12 engineers, halved CI build times, and shifted Web Vitals from red to green. Adopted Spotify's engineering culture model to improve team autonomy and delivery.

Deep AWS expertise backed by multiple certifications (Developer Associate, Solutions Architect Associate). Designed and shipped production serverless architectures with Lambda, DynamoDB, SQS, and API Gateway — both commercially and for own products.
Currently expanding into system architecture and distributed systems design, with a focus on scalability patterns, event-driven architectures, and cross-team technical leadership.

list.name: Leadership
list.descr:
• Scaled a frontend team from 6 to 12 engineers through structured hiring and interviews
  • Mentored engineers via regular 1:1 sessions and architecture design reviews
  • Established code review culture and implemented a developer bonus system
  • Led R&D initiatives to resolve cross-team technical challenges
  • Drove adoption of Spotify engineering culture for team autonomy

list.name: System Design & Architecture
list.descr:
• Designed end-to-end serverless event-driven architectures on AWS (Lambda, SQS, DynamoDB, API Gateway) and GCP (Cloud Functions, Firestore)
  • Migrated monolithic .NET/jQuery platform to microservices with Angular + GraphQL
  • Designed real-time data pipelines for crypto trading platform (WebSocket, sub-second updates)
  • Implemented GEOHASH-based geospatial service for public transport ETA calculation

list.name: AI & Machine Learning
list.descr:
• Built ELI — an AI-powered language tutor using LangChain for LLM orchestration, fine-tuned GPT models, and GPU-serverless voice recognition with Whisper
  • Hands-on experience with RAG pipelines, vector databases, and transformer architectures
  • Daily use of AI agents and orchestration workflows (Claude, Codex) for development acceleration
  • Actively working toward fully autonomous coding pipelines

list.name: Front-End Engineering
list.descr:
• TypeScript/JavaScript — advanced type system usage (generics, conditional types, type guards), strict mode advocacy, deep understanding of async patterns and the event loop
  • React — primary framework; built real-time trading interfaces with Redux, SignalR/WebSockets, and RxJS for reactive forms
  • Angular — 4 years of production experience; performance optimization (Zone.js, RxAngular), DI/IoC patterns, SSR
  • RxJS — advanced reactive programming with custom operators for high-frequency data streams
  • CSS/SCSS/PostCSS/Tailwind — utility-first approach, custom PostCSS plugins, design system implementation

list.name: Cloud & DevOps
list.descr:
• AWS (certified) — Lambda, DynamoDB, SQS, SNS, API Gateway, S3, CloudFront, Cognito. Built production serverless systems for both commercial and own products
  • GCP — designed and shipped a commercial GEOHASH-based ETA service using Cloud Functions + Datastore
  • Infrastructure as Code — SAM, CDK; working toward Terraform/Pulumi proficiency
  • CI/CD — migrated commercial projects from TeamCity to GitHub Actions, achieving 2x faster builds with incremental builds and dynamic agent scaling
  • Docker — regular use in development and deployment workflows

list.name: Backend & Data
list.descr:
• Node.js — REST APIs (Express/Koa), SSR optimization, tooling and CLI development
  • GraphQL (Apollo) — primary data layer for a high-traffic job board; developed custom resolvers
  • NoSQL — DynamoDB (production), Firestore (GCP), MongoDB; SQL via Athena/S3 Select for analytics
  • Python, Go — scripting, tooling, and backend services

list.name: Co-Founder: ELI — AI Language Tutor
list.descr:
Co-founded ELI and led the engineering direction of an AI-powered English tutor that outperforms generic ChatGPT conversations by focusing on pronunciation analysis, personalized learning plans, and goal-oriented practice (interviews, work meetings, relocation scenarios).

Architecture & AI: Designed a fully serverless AWS stack (Lambda, DynamoDB, SQS, API Gateway, CloudFront, Cognito). Implemented LLM orchestration using LangChain with fine-tuned GPT models. Built GPU-serverless voice recognition pipeline using Whisper that provides real-time pronunciation feedback and phoneme-level analysis.

Payments: Developed custom Stripe integration with a tier-based subscription model (each tier with its own minutes limit). Implemented Stripe webhooks on GCP Cloud Functions with Firestore for real-time payment event processing, fully integrated with Firebase Auth and user management.

Product & Data: Engineered a smart user profile system that continuously learns from each conversation — tracking weak sounds, vocabulary gaps, and progress toward concrete goals. The system adapts dialogue difficulty, vocabulary selection, and scenario complexity based on accumulated learner data, delivering measurably better outcomes than generic AI chat interfaces.

Owned the technical execution end to end: system architecture, backend, frontend, AI pipeline, payments, infrastructure, CI/CD, and landing page engineering.

list.name: Senior Front-end Engineer: XBO.com
list.descr:
Architected and developed the frontend of XBO.com — an award-winning crypto exchange platform (Best Digital Assets Exchange 2024, Best Crypto Processing Solution 2025) supporting spot trading, futures, CFDs, and a loyalty program across 10+ languages.

Real-time systems: Designed the real-time data layer using SignalR/WebSockets delivering sub-second updates for order books, charts, price tickers, and portfolio positions. Engineered reactive state management with RxJS to handle high-frequency data streams without UI degradation.

Technical challenges: Solved financial precision issues with arbitrary-precision arithmetic to ensure accuracy across trading calculations. Built complex reactive forms with real-time validation for order placement, leveraging advanced TypeScript patterns for type-safe financial computations.

Stack: React, Redux, TypeScript, SignalR, RxJS.

list.name: Lead Front-end & DevOps Engineer: ducky.app
list.descr:
Led frontend architecture and DevOps for a startup building a B2B benefits management platform ("Benefits Cafeteria") in a team of 10.

Owned all architectural decisions for the frontend: selected Angular + Tailwind as a design system, established project structure and conventions for scalability, and set up the full CI/CD pipeline. Balanced rapid feature delivery (startup pace) with maintainable, future-proof architecture.

Also contributed to DevOps — automated deployment processes, configured CI/CD, and established environment management. The product was not delivered to market due to funding constraints.

list.name: Front-end Tech Lead: robota.ua
list.descr:
Technical lead for the frontend platform of Ukraine's largest job board — serving 6.5M+ resumes, 100K+ active job listings, and 35K+ companies. Grew the frontend team from 6 to 12 engineers. Drove adoption of Spotify's engineering culture model for improved team autonomy.

  • Reliability: Migrated codebase to TypeScript strict mode, integrated SonarQube for static analysis in PRs, expanded ESLint coverage, and added Sentry for real-time error tracking with automatic developer assignment. Significantly reduced production incidents.

  • CI/CD performance: Led migration from TeamCity to GitHub Actions with dynamic agent scaling. Introduced incremental builds and caching, reducing average build times from ~40 to ~20 minutes and eliminating CI queues entirely.

  • Web Vitals: Implemented Cloudflare optimizations, static content caching strategies, and adopted RxAngular to reduce zone.js overhead. Moved critical pages from red to green in Core Web Vitals.

  • Developer experience: Built interactive CLI tools with prompts and autocompletion for routine tasks (library generation, GraphQL schema regeneration), eliminating the need to memorize complex commands.

list.name: Front-end Engineer: robota.ua
list.descr:
Core contributor to the modernization of Ukraine's largest job board — a 20-year-old flagship product serving millions of users.

Led the migration from a monolithic .NET/jQuery architecture to a modern microservices stack: Angular, GraphQL (Apollo), and a Tailwind-based component design system. Built the mobile SPA from scratch within months. Over 4 years, evolved the codebase from basic Angular usage to advanced patterns: custom RxJS operators, Zone.js performance tuning, comprehensive TypeScript and ESLint enforcement.

Beyond frontend: designed and built a serverless GEOHASH-based ETA microservice for public transport on GCP (Cloud Functions + Datastore), significantly reducing Google Maps API costs while maintaining accuracy. Progressed from mid-level engineer to Tech Lead during this tenure.

list.name: Published Course Author: ITVDN.com [part-time]
list.descr: Authored and published a comprehensive course on advanced React and Redux patterns on the ITVDN educational platform. Available on ITVDN and YouTube.

list.name: Front-end Engineer: Lazard Export
list.descr: Built the dashboard for an IoT door access management system using React and Redux in the early days of modern frontend tooling. Set up the build pipeline (Webpack, PostCSS) from scratch.

list.name: Front-end Engineer: ITCG (Digital Agency)
list.descr: First professional role. Developed landing pages, interactive advertising banners, and a full-stack marketplace project (Django + JS). Transitioned from freelancing to professional software engineering.
